## What this changes

(Brief description of the change.)

## Type

- [ ] Typo or minor clarity fix
- [ ] New error page or guide
- [ ] Update to existing content (patch version, workaround, etc.)
- [ ] Known issues update
- [ ] Repo meta (README, CONTRIBUTING, templates, etc.)

## Verification

(How do you know this is accurate? Did you reproduce it? Does someone else confirm? Link to a Discord thread or GitHub issue if relevant.)

## Checklist

- [ ] I've read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Any log excerpts are redacted (no account IDs, Steam tickets, or home-dir paths)
- [ ] Links work and point to the right places
- [ ] Style matches existing content (no em dashes, direct tone)
